daily_fact: Stay engaged with your community through local news and civic participation.
topline_md: A Staten Island house fire injured four firefighters and five residents, while NYC's subway service faced significant disruptions post-blizzard, leading to school closures and emergency responses across the city. Additionally, a former Bronx councilman and wedding guests were stranded in Mexico amid cartel unrest.

risks_alerts.title: Risks & Alerts
risks_alerts.summary_md:
### Risks & Alerts

- Four firefighters and five residents injured in Staten Island house fire; over 141 emergency personnel responded. [↗](https://news.google.?oc=5)
- Former Bronx City Councilman Andy King and 25 wedding party guests stranded in Mexico due to cartel unrest. [↗](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMixAFBVV95cUxOMFhtWmxhSVdTQkNiSThjOE0weExvQTgtZzR1d0Z3aXdnYWJ3cDVjeVVIQWh6ZHkxQnBLdmVTYUdzMUJTNC1lLVFUeENOV3BkaEw3MkFCVWNVbFd0LVk5SUFHQnAtNnhFUVlXdzFoSkMzUlJaelNhd05GSXp6Z1pxQXdfeVc5dVQ2QUdraGwtLVpfNW5GTi1rdFRYNmQzWW83U3dRa2FKeVdXdHFhRUpKQWU5Sk4tLWNlUjlVMmFIMy1sMWM1?oc=5)
- NYC subway service disrupted as riders return following blizzard; expect delays. - Yonkers schools closed for a third day due to heavy snow from the blizzard. [↗](https://news.google.?oc=5)
- Snowstorm caused numerous trees to fall across NYC, posing hazards in various neighborhoods. opportunities_welfare.title: Opportunities & Welfare
opportunities_welfare.summary_md:
### Opportunities & Welfare

- Mounting eviction cases indicate NYC's 'affordable' housing is becoming increasingly unaffordable.
